zh.lifeSummary: 當Lettice de Mowbray於1260年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾瓦可霍爾時，她的父親Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk41歲，母親Lady Maud de Beauchamp35歲。她於大約1277年與Henry Bellard ?在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特薩爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lettice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval vernacular form of the Latin name   Laetitia .  It was in use in Britain in the Middle Ages, but then fell out of use until revived by the Victorians. It is now once again out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Lettice de Mowbray was born in 1260, in Waxholme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk, was 41 and her mother, Lady Maud de Beauchamp, was 35. She married Henry Bellard ? about 1277, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in Salford, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lettice de Mowbray est née en 1260, à Waxholme, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Beauchamp, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Bellard ? environ 1277, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée à Salford, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lettice de Mowbrayが1260年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワクスhオルメで生まれた時，父Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirskは41歳，母Lady Maud de Beauchampは35歳であった。約1277年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターでHenry Bellard ?と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターサルフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lettice de Mowbray(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 와스홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Mowbray Baron of Thirsk(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Maud de Beauchamp(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1277년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 Henry Bellard ?(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 살퍼드에서 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Bellard ? около 1277 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в местности салфорд, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания.
